widgetData.source_sentence: Unless you have this jam-packed full of items, the unit collapses on itself. I never held it's shape therefore, making it hard to reach my items when I needed them. The silver metal pieces on the handle fell off soon after it arrived. I must have missed the "return by" date as I now am stuck with it.
sentences: I thought the bag would be much lighter. The bag, however, is good quality.
Good quality gasket and it was packaged well. Fit great as well.
Battery life is pretty short. But it super fun while it lasts!! My nephews loved them!

widgetData.source_sentence: I never got my item even though it said delivered.
sentences: These hooks work great for my boutique I have. I am able to hang scarves and different things from them including purses. They take up less space and last forever. The quality is excellent and so is the price!
Did not have a timer. This was huge for me and the heart monitor was way off
Very quite running and seems to be quality made. Really like the aluminum casing.

sentences: Had this Item for a year and it is already ripping everywhere and faded badly. I do not recommend.
I have been buying this cologne for sometime now and love it. I get compliments all the time.

these bracelets have a few good ones included but most are cheaply made and one broke as soon as i put it on. not a good deal. I was NOT impressed. They have just a couple beaded ones and the rest are brittle and flimsy like they are worn out or have been exposed to dry out some... i dunno but i wont order from there again. BOO!

widgetData.source_sentence: Absolutely cannot get lotion out of bottle... despite storing it upside down! I will have to throw out.f
sentences: There are decent for the price. They are larger, in width- not circumference,than the original guitar string bracelets and I have noticed the gold color coming off. They popped off easy at first and I had to go in and re-tighten all of them. Again, for the price, they are not horrible, but if you want a pair that will last a while, just get the better pair.
